_schema: {year: production_1000_60kg_bags} — Brazilian arabica annual harvest. The year is the calendar year of the harvest (May-Sep harvest of year Y is produced by weather Aug Y-1 to May Y).
_source: Approximate USDA PSD historical series, rounded to the nearest 100k bags. Real numbers vary slightly between USDA, CONAB, and ICO; the absolute level matters less than the year-over-year shape (the visible biennial cycle drives the analog signal).
_replace_when: Plumb in real CONAB safra series via a scraper. Until then, this seed is good enough for analog ranking.
